entry.title: Bill 63 (Hawaiʻi County): Passed Second Reading → —
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 25, ARTICLE 5, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO DWELLINGS

Permits residential dwellings within the industrial-commercial mixed use (MCX) zoning district.

Status: Passed Second Reading → —

Latest action: On agenda 2026-02-18

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 63 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 25, ARTICLE 5, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO DWELLINGS

Permits residential dwellings within the industrial-commercial mixed use (MCX) zoning district.

Latest action: Council: Bill 63, Draft 3 passes second & final reading - 02/18/26

View on the council site
